tests.name: Random Topology 1
tests.qemuCommand:
-M q35,cxl=on \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.0,bus_nr=12 \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.1,bus_nr=13 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=0,id=rp-0.0,chassis=0,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=0,id=rp-1.0,chassis=1,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=1,id=rp-1.1,chassis=1,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=2,id=rp-1.2,chassis=1,slot=2 \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-0.0,id=us0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw0.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw0.1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=2,chassis=0,slot=2,id=sw0.2 \
    -device cxl-switch-mailbox-cci,bus=us0,id=sw0-mailbox \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-1.0,id=us1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us1,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw1.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us1,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw1.1 \
    -device cxl-switch-mailbox-cci,bus=us1,id=sw1-mailbox \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-1.1,id=us2 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us2,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw2.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us2,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw2.1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us2,port=2,chassis=0,slot=2,id=sw2.2 \
    -device cxl-switch-mailbox-cci,bus=us2,id=sw2-mailbox \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.0,persistent-memdev=mem0,lsa=lsa-mem0,id=cxl-type3-dev-0,sn=0xA9A91BD1 \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=sw0.1,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-0,id=cxl-ac-dev-0,sn=0x9103C3DD \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=sw0.2,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-1,id=cxl-ac-dev-1,sn=0x6DE6CD77 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw1.0,persistent-memdev=mem1,lsa=lsa-mem1,id=cxl-type3-dev-1,sn=0x85408E05 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw1.1,persistent-memdev=mem2,lsa=lsa-mem2,id=cxl-type3-dev-2,sn=0x6CA63913 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw2.0,volatile-memdev=mem3,id=cxl-type3-dev-3,sn=0x7BC5AD02 \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=sw2.1,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-2,id=cxl-ac-dev-2,sn=0xAF07A505 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw2.2,volatile-memdev=mem4,id=cxl-type3-dev-4,sn=0xBA2E0BA7 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.2,volatile-memdev=mem5,id=cxl-type3-dev-5,sn=0xB26F4E3A \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem0,size=256M,mem-path=/tmp/mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem0,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-0,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-1,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem1,size=2G,mem-path=/tmp/mem1.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem1,size=8M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem1.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem2,size=1G,mem-path=/tmp/mem2.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem2,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem2.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem3,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-2,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem4,size=2G \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem5,size=512M

tests.name: Random Topology 2
tests.qemuCommand:
-M q35,cxl=on \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.0,bus_nr=12 \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.1,bus_nr=13 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=0,id=rp-0.0,chassis=0,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=0,id=rp-1.0,chassis=1,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=1,id=rp-1.1,chassis=1,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-1.0,id=us0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw0.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw0.1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=2,chassis=0,slot=2,id=sw0.2 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=3,chassis=0,slot=3,id=sw0.3 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.1,persistent-memdev=mem0,lsa=lsa-mem0,id=cxl-type3-dev-0,sn=0xAF84F8A9 \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=sw0.0,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-0,id=cxl-ac-dev-0,sn=0x053ABAEB \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=sw0.1,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-1,id=cxl-ac-dev-1,sn=0x08C56B6D \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.2,volatile-memdev=mem1,id=cxl-type3-dev-1,sn=0x14DE0A8C \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.3,volatile-dc-memdev=mem2,id=cxl-type3-dev-2,num-dc-regions=1,sn=0xDBD24F21 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-0.0,volatile-memdev=mem3,id=cxl-type3-dev-3,sn=0xCE929F25 \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem0,size=2G,mem-path=/tmp/mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem0,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-0,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-1,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem1,size=1G \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem2,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem3,size=512M

tests.name: Random Topology 3
tests.qemuCommand:
-M q35,cxl=on \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.0,bus_nr=12 \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.1,bus_nr=13 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=0,id=rp-0.0,chassis=0,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=1,id=rp-0.1,chassis=0,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=0,id=rp-1.0,chassis=1,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=1,id=rp-1.1,chassis=1,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=2,id=rp-1.2,chassis=1,slot=2 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-0.0,persistent-memdev=mem0,lsa=lsa-mem0,id=cxl-type3-dev-0,sn=0x8BE9CEF3 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-0.1,volatile-dc-memdev=mem1,id=cxl-type3-dev-1,num-dc-regions=1,sn=0x163E2BDE \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=rp-1.0,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-0,id=cxl-ac-dev-0,sn=0x6724F8D7 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.1,volatile-memdev=mem2,id=cxl-type3-dev-2,sn=0xDC1A25E6 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.2,volatile-memdev=mem3,id=cxl-type3-dev-3,sn=0x558EA77E \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem0,size=512M,mem-path=/tmp/mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem0,size=8M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem1,size=2G \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-0,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem2,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem3,size=2G

tests.name: Random Topology 5
tests.qemuCommand:
-M q35,cxl=on \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.0,bus_nr=12 \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.1,bus_nr=13 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=0,id=rp-0.0,chassis=0,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=1,id=rp-0.1,chassis=0,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=0,id=rp-1.0,chassis=1,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=1,id=rp-1.1,chassis=1,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=2,id=rp-1.2,chassis=1,slot=2 \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=rp-0.0,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-0,id=cxl-ac-dev-0,sn=0xF93F4DBD \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-0.1,volatile-memdev=mem0,id=cxl-type3-dev-0,sn=0xD9DF65E5 \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-1.0,id=us0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw0.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw0.1 \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=rp-1.1,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-1,id=cxl-ac-dev-1,sn=0xE80007E5 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.2,persistent-memdev=mem1,lsa=lsa-mem1,id=cxl-type3-dev-1,sn=0x3D34F9FD \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.0,persistent-memdev=mem2,lsa=lsa-mem2,id=cxl-type3-dev-2,sn=0x78F18358 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.1,volatile-memdev=mem3,id=cxl-type3-dev-3,sn=0x3C642C73 \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-0,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem0,size=1G \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-1,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem1,size=512M,mem-path=/tmp/mem1.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem1,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem1.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem2,size=2G,mem-path=/tmp/mem2.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem2,size=8M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem2.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem3,size=512M
